Class AdopterPreferences

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.AdopterPreferences
public class AdopterPreferences extends Object
Represents the adoption preferences of a prospective adopter. Preferences include desired species, breed, activity level, age range, and whether the adopter requires already-vaccinated animals; these are consumed by matching strategies to score compatibility with available animals. All fields may be null to indicate no preference, including minAge and maxAge.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdopterPreferences

      public AdopterPreferences(Species preferredSpecies, String preferredBreed, ActivityLevel preferredActivityLevel, Boolean requiresVaccinated, Integer minAge, Integer maxAge)
      Constructs an AdopterPreferences instance with the given criteria. Any field may be null to express no preference. When minAge or maxAge are null, the age criterion is not applied during matching.
      Parameters:
      preferredSpecies - the desired Species, or null for no preference
      preferredBreed - the desired breed, or null for no preference
      preferredActivityLevel - the desired activity level, or null for no preference
      requiresVaccinated - true if the adopter requires vaccinated animals, or null for no vaccination preference
      minAge - the minimum preferred age in years; must be non-negative if provided
      maxAge - the maximum preferred age in years; must be >= minAge if both provided
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if minAge is negative or maxAge < minAge

    • AdopterPreferences

      public AdopterPreferences(AdopterPreferences other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new AdopterPreferences with all field values copied from other. Since all fields are final and immutable (enums, primitives, String), a shallow copy is sufficient.
      Parameters:
      other - the AdopterPreferences instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getPreferredSpecies

      public Species getPreferredSpecies()
      Returns the preferred species, or null if no species preference was set.
      Returns:
      the preferred Species, or null

    • getPreferredBreed

      public String getPreferredBreed()
      Returns the preferred breed, or null if no breed preference was set.
      Returns:
      the preferred breed, or null

    • getPreferredActivityLevel

      public ActivityLevel getPreferredActivityLevel()
      Returns the preferred activity level, or null if no preference was set.
      Returns:
      the preferred ActivityLevel, or null

    • getRequiresVaccinated

      public Boolean getRequiresVaccinated()
      Returns whether the adopter requires vaccinated animals.
      Returns:
      true if vaccinated animals are required, or null for no preference

    • getMinAge

      public Integer getMinAge()
      Returns the minimum preferred age in years, or null if no minimum was set.
      Returns:
      the minimum preferred age, or null for no preference

    • getMaxAge

      public Integer getMaxAge()
      Returns the maximum preferred age in years, or null if no maximum was set.
      Returns:
      the maximum preferred age, or null for no preference

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is an AdopterPreferences with equal field values. Equality is based on all fields since this is a value object with no unique ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if all preference fields are equal

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on all preference fields. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of these preferences including species, breed, activity level, and age range.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of these preferences
